name: venom-chat-executor
description: Agentic developer assistant for Venom projects: code search, git, file reading, and safe command execution via @venom-agent.

chatParticipants.name: venom-agent
chatParticipants.description: Agentic assistant for Venom projects: code search, git status/log/diff, file reading, and safe test execution.

languageModelTools.name: venom_git_status
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a read-only git command (status, diff, log, branch, etc.) in the workspace root. Returns exact output with REPO_ROOT prefix.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Run a git read-only command and return exact output.

command.description: Git command to run, e.g. 'git status --short --branch' or 'git log --oneline -5'.

languageModelTools.name: run_git_status
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Backward-compatible alias for venom_git_status. Prefer venom_git_status for new interactions.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Run a local git read-only command and return exact output.

command.description: Command to execute in workspace root.

languageModelTools.name: venom_search_code
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search code in the workspace using ripgrep. Returns file paths, line numbers, and matching lines. Use for finding classes, functions, symbols, or any text pattern.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Search code in the project using ripgrep.

query.description: Search pattern (text or regex) to find in the codebase.

path_glob.description: Optional glob to restrict search, e.g. '*.py' or '*.ts'.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10).

languageModelTools.name: venom_read_file
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read a fragment of a file around a specific line number with surrounding context. Use after venom_search_code to get code context.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Read a file fragment with surrounding context lines.

file_path.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the file.

line.description: Line number to center the context around.

context_lines.description: Number of lines of context around the target line (default: 5).

languageModelTools.name: venom_exec_safe
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a safe, allowed command (pytest, ruff check, mypy, npm test, or documented Makefile test targets) in the workspace. Requires venom.execution.allowExec=true in settings.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Run a safe test/lint command in the workspace (requires allowExec=true).

command.description: Command to run, e.g. 'pytest venom_core/tests/', 'ruff check .', 'mypy venom_core'.

venom.execution.repoRoot.description: Absolute repository root used by Venom tools. If empty, auto-detected via git rev-parse from the current workspace.

venom.execution.allowExec.description: Allow @venom-agent to execute safe commands (pytest, ruff, mypy, npm test, or documented Makefile test targets). Disabled by default for safety.

venom.execution.maxIterations.description: Maximum number of agentic loop iterations before @venom-agent stops and reports a partial answer.

venom.execution.searchTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for ripgrep-based code search in milliseconds.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:contract
